message:
feat(workflows): add HandleSessionStartContext workflow for session.start events

New HandleSessionStartContext workflow that fires on session.start
pattern events (claude_code.banner rule). On each session start:

1. Cooldown check (10-minute window) to prevent spam
2. Extract bead IDs from pane title/matched text
3. Build query candidates from pane CWD, title, and extracted metadata
4. Run cass lookup for related past session hints
5. Record audit decision
6. Inject startup context prompt into pane with agent type, model,
   bead hints, cass results, and next-step commands

Implementation details:
- SessionStartCassHintsLookup struct captures query, candidates,
  workspace, hints, and errors
- build_context_prompt() formats a startup guide with all gathered
  context
- patterns.rs: claude_code.banner rule now has
  workflow: Some("handle_session_start_context") instead of None
- main.rs: 6 registration sites updated to include the new workflow,
  resolve_workflow name routing added, RobotWorkflowInfo listing
  updated (workflow count 7->8)

6 new tests: metadata validation, handles filtering, query candidate
ordering, prompt content verification, no-hints guidance fallback,
shell-safe quoting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1317,7 +1317,7 @@ fn builtin_claude_code_pack() -> PatternPack {
                 ),
                 description: "Claude Code session start banner".to_string(),
                 remediation: None,
-                workflow: None,
+                workflow: Some("handle_session_start_context".to_string()),
                 manual_fix: None,
                 preview_command: None,
                 learn_more_url: None,
